query: A clinical team claims adult resting heart rate is 72 bpm. Given sample [68,74,71,75,69,73,72,70], run a one-sample test and determine whether the claim should be challenged at alpha=0.05.
Manufacturing QA logged widget diameters in mm: [10.1,10.3,10.0,9.9,10.2,14.8,10.1]. Identify anomalous measurements before release.
Before approving a parametric analysis, check whether exam scores [72,75,74,78,73,76,77,74,75,73] satisfy the normality assumption.
Provide a 99% confidence interval for mean blood pressure from sample [120,118,125,122,119,123,121] for the clinician report.
A teacher wants comparable grading across sections. Convert quiz scores [55, 70, 85, 90, 60] into z-scores.
Marketing wants a forecasting baseline: ad spend x=[1,2,3,4,5] (thousands) and sales y=[120,150,180,200,230]. Build a linear regression model to predict sales from spend.
IoT sensor readings are noisy: [22,25,23,28,30,27,31,29,33,35]. Smooth them using a 4-period moving average.
For learning analytics, quantify co-movement between study hours [2,3,5,6,7] and exam scores [55,65,80,88,92] using covariance.
Compensation data appears right-skewed due to executive pay. For values [48000,51000,49000,52000,50000,53000,480000,520000], compute skewness.
Product analytics needs a compact summary of two weeks of daily visits: [1200,1350,980,1100,1420,1300,900,1250,1180,1400,1050,1320,970,1230]. Generate descriptive statistics.
Risk team is testing tail behavior of returns [0.02,-0.01,0.03,0.015,-0.005,0.025,0.01,-0.02,0.018,0.012]. Compute kurtosis relative to normal.
Operations is reviewing delivery-time spread for [24,18,36,22,19,42,21,28,17,35,20,30] hours. Return Q1, median, and Q3.
